# nomad_jwks (Data Source)

Retrieve the cluster JWKS public keys.

The keys are returned both as a list of maps (`keys`), and as a list of PEM-encoded strings (`pem_keys`), which may be more convenient for use.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_jwks" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `keys` (List of Object) JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) public keys for validating workload identity JWTs (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))
- `pem_keys` (List of String) JWKS as a list of PEM keys

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `algorithm` (String)
- `curve` (String)
- `exponent` (String)
- `key_id` (String)
- `key_type` (String)
- `key_use` (String)
- `modulus` (String)
- `x` (String)
